title: Revolve Group Announces Third Quarter 2024 Financial Results
text: Revolve Group reported strong third-quarter 2024 results with net sales reaching $283.1 million, representing a 10% year-over-year increase. The company achieved net income of $10.8 million, up significantly from $3.2 million in the prior-year quarter. The retailer expanded its active customer base to 2.628 million, a 5% increase compared to the same period last year. Co-founder Mike Karanikolas noted the quarter's success: We delivered exceptional results in the third quarter, highlighted by double-digit top-line growth, significant expansion of net income, and 85% growth in Adjusted EBITDA. Gross margin decreased slightly to 51.2% from 51.7%, primarily due to deeper markdowns and increased shipping costs. However, the company achieved meaningful operational efficiencies—fulfillment costs improved to 3.3% of sales, while marketing expenses declined to 14.0% of sales from 15.4%. Management projected full-year 2024 gross margin at 52.2%, with operating expenses expected to remain well-controlled across fulfillment, marketing, and administrative categories. The company maintained a strong balance sheet with $252.8 million in cash and zero debt, while returning capital through $1.9 million in share repurchases during the quarter.
